name: SWEET PLANTAIN and FRESH CORN CAKES

ingredients.item: 2 cups plus 3 tablespoons unsweetened almond milk, homemade or store-bought
ingredients.original: 2 cups plus 3 tablespoons unsweetened almond milk, homemade or store-bought

ingredients.item: Kernels from 1 ear of sweet corn (store the cob in the freezer to make Corn Broth)
ingredients.original: Kernels from 1 ear of sweet corn (store the cob in the freezer to make Corn Broth)

ingredients.item: 1 tablespoon extra-virgin olive oil, plus more as needed for panfrying
ingredients.original: 1 tablespoon extra-virgin olive oil, plus more as needed for panfrying

ingredients.item: Salty Lemon Cream with Parsley, for serving
